ogTitle: Pearl Beach vs Pebbly Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Pearl Beach vs Pebbly Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pearl Beach, New South Wales and Pebbly Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pebbly Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Pearl Beach (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pearl Beach or Pebbly Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pearl Beach has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Pebbly Beach scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pearl Beach scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Pebbly Beach scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pearl Beach or Pebbly Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pebbly Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
